name: waza
description: Personal skill collection for Claude Code: think, check, hunt, design, read, write, learn, health.

plugins.name: health
plugins.description: Run when Claude ignores rules, hooks malfunction, or MCP needs auditing.

plugins.name: think
plugins.description: Use before building anything new or when a plan needs review.

plugins.name: check
plugins.description: Use after completing a task or before merging.

plugins.name: hunt
plugins.description: Use when encountering a bug, crash, or test failure.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Use when building UI, components, or pages.

plugins.name: read
plugins.description: Use when fetching a URL, web page, or PDF as Markdown.

plugins.name: write
plugins.description: Use only when explicitly asked to write or edit prose.

plugins.name: learn
plugins.description: Use when researching an unfamiliar domain or preparing a research article.
